---
title: "Get to know your team"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
engine: knitr
---

-   Create a MS Teams chat with your members of your team

-   Share the following with your team:

    1.  **Your name & role**\
    2.  **Your first-ever job** (describe it or use emojis!)\
    3.  **Your favourite food** 🍕🍣🍫\
    4.  **An app you can’t live without** 📱

🎨 *Bonus:* Describe each one with a GIF, sticker, or emoji combo!
